problem.title: Minimum Spanning Tree using Prim’s Algorithm
problem.description:
Problem Statement
Given weighted undirected graph, compute total weight of Minimum Spanning Tree using Prim’s algorithm.

Input Format
n m
u v w
...

Output Format
Total weight of MST.

Sample Input
4 5
1 2 3
1 3 5
2 3 1
2 4 4
3 4 2

Sample Output
6

Explanation
One possible MST edges: (2-3), (3-4), (1-2)

solution.explanation: Use Prim’s algorithm with an adjacency matrix; repeatedly pick the unvisited vertex with the smallest connecting edge, add its weight to the total, and relax edges to remaining vertices.
